title: Astral Age
description: This assembly has a tendency towards vanilla survival, but combined with space and lamp pastime
body:
# Modpack Description 🚀🌍

As I mentioned in the build summary, it leans towards **classic vanilla survival**🏕️ with the addition of a [**space mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)🪐. There are also mods for **more enjoyable world generation**🌄.

## Modpack Features:
- As for the features, I can say that **in this modpack, YOU are the master**👑. You can do whatever you want, and **no one has the right to stop you**✋. The cutest and most fun mod I found and decided to add is the [**camera mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)📸, and I really loved it. Now I want to **wander around taking pictures of everything I see**🌳🌼. And when I get tired of that, **I’ll build a rocket🚀, fly to space🌌, conquer Mars faster than Elon Musk**🪖, and keep taking photos, but this time on other planets🌠.
  
- In this modpack, you will find many **interesting new animals**🦌🐻 added thanks to the [**Naturalist**](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) mod.
  
- A [**voice chat mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)🎙️ has also been included so you can fully immerse yourself in this amazing gameplay🌟. Invite your friends👥  and begin your journey as **photographers📸, archaeologists🏺, astronomers🔭, and zoologists🐾**.

# Below are some small photos📸🚀
![Rockets, skeletons and a beautiful sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb3694584d2243b3b176b4c02dc603b0b606f108.jpeg)
![Everything is the same, but from a different angle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eabfe4f15e41539381b5a09e8a8e4ff70e2c57e.jpeg)
